products.name: EPSON DOT MATRIX PRINTER LQ-690II
products.description: The 24-pin dot matrix impact printer operates as a robust printing device that meets the needs of business operations by printing multiple document types. The system produces rapid and accurate textual output while maintaining operational durability in both office and industrial settings.
products.fullDescription:
• Print Technology: 24-pin impact dot matrix, reliable for multipart form printing.
• Printable Columns: 106 columns at 10 cpi, wide printable area.
• Print Speed: High-Speed Draft: up to 487 cps (10 cpi), 12 cpi High-Speed: up to 529 cps, Draft: ~366–396 cps, Letter Quality: 121–132 cps, fast output for continuous and form printing.
• Print Resolution: 360 × 180 dpi, clear character and text quality.
• Copy Capability: Prints 1 original + up to 6 copies, handy for multi-part forms.
• Character Sets & Barcodes: Supports a range of character tables and built-in barcodes (e.g., Code 39, EAN-13, UPC-A).
• Interfaces: USB 2.0 and Bidirectional Parallel (IEEE-1284), standard PC connectivity.
• Media Handling: Front, rear, and bottom feeds; accepts single sheets, continuous paper, envelopes, roll paper, labels, and card stock.

• MTBF: 20,000 power-on hours, dependable in busy printing environments.
• Buffer Memory: 128 KB, smooth data handling.
• Supported Paper Thickness: Continuous: 0.065 – 0.49 mm, Single sheet: 0.065 – 0.15 mm, Labels/multi-part: 0.16 – 0.49 mm
• Dimensions & Weight: 480 × 301 × 211 mm, 6.8 kg, sturdy desktop footprint.
• Power Consumption: 38 W (printing), 3 W (standby).
• Operating Environment: 5 – 35 °C; humidity 10 – 80 % RH (non-condensing).

products.name: Epson Perfection V39II

The device serves home and office environments as well as creative spaces to digitalize various materials, including photos and documents, and artwork, while producing detailed scans that can be saved in multiple file formats.
products.fullDescription:

• Buttons: Four one‑touch buttons for quick scanning to PDF, email, copy, and more.
• Supported File Formats: JPEG, PDF, Searchable PDF, BMP, TIFF, PNG.
• Operating Systems: Works with Windows (10, 8, 7) and macOS (10.6.8 or later).
• Dimensions: 249 × 364 × 39 mm (W × D × H).
• Weight: 1.4 kg, lightweight and space‑saving design.
• Best for: Scanning photos, documents, receipts, artwork, and books with high clarity, creating searchable PDFs and editable office files, and easy sharing via email or cloud services.

products.name: HP SCANJET PRO 3000 S4
products.description: The high-speed sheet-fed document scanner operates as an automatic document feeder that supports 50 sheets and performs fast duplex scanning to create multiple output file formats. The system operates in a compact design yet delivers dependable results for daily scanning tasks, which include archiving, OCR processing, and searchable PDF creation.
products.fullDescription:
• Scanner Type: Sheet-fed document scanner with automatic document feeder (ADF).
• Scan Resolution: Up to 600 × 600 dpi optical (software up to 1200 dpi).
• Scan Speed: Up to 40 ppm (pages per minute) for single-sided; 80 ipm (images per minute) for duplex.
• ADF Capacity: 50 sheets standard.
• Duplex Scanning: Yes, single-pass two-sided scanning.
• Daily Duty Cycle: Recommended up to 4,000 pages/day.
• Color Scanning: Yes (color & black-and-white).
• Bit Depth: 24-bit external / 48-bit internal for rich color depth.
• Grayscale Levels: 256 levels of gray.
• Scan File Formats: PDF, PDF/A, Encrypted PDF, JPEG, PNG, BMP, TIFF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Text (.txt), RTF, and searchable PDF.
• Scan Technology: CMOS CIS (Contact Image Sensor).
• Multifeed Detection: Yes, helps catch misfeeds while scanning., supports long documents.
• Media Sizes: A4, A5, A6, B5, and custom lengths up to 3100 mm
• Media Types Supported: Cut sheets, laser/inkjet printed pages, bank checks, business cards, carbonless forms, plastic cards (up to 1.24 mm).
• Connectivity: USB 3.0.
• Operating Systems: Windows, macOS, Linux (via TWAIN/ISIS/WIA drivers), with wide compatibility.
• Dimensions & Weight: Approx. 300 × 172 × 154 mm and 2.7 kg, compact and desktop-friendly.
• Power & Efficiency: ENERGY STAR certified with low power consumption.
• Best for: Offices, workgroups, and business environments that need fast, reliable batch scanning with automatic duplex, OCR support, and flexible file outputs for digital archiving or workflows.

products.name: RISO Ink FII Type Black E
products.description: RISO duplicators and risograph machines require professional-grade black ink, which has been specifically developed for their operation. FII-Type Black ink produces deep and rich black prints that maintain high quality throughout their entire printing process, making it suitable for demanding black-and-white duplication work in offices, schools, and print shops.
products.fullDescription:
• Type: Black ink (FII Type) for RISO duplicator/risograph printers.
• Color: Black.
• Volume: 1000 ml per tube/cartridge, large‑capacity supply.
• Compatibility: Works with various RISO SF, EZ, RZ, and MZ series machines (e.g., SF5030, SF5350, SF9350, EZ200, RZ200, MZ730, etc.).
• Yield: Approximately 18,000 – 36,000 A4 prints per 1000 ml tube (depends on machine model, print coverage, and settings).
• Performance: Produces crisp, clear black text and graphics with reliable consistency for high‑volume printing.
• Installation: Simple tube swap into the RISO duplicator compartment with no special tools required.
• Best for: High‑volume duplicating workflows and heavy‑use environments where dependable black‑and‑white output is needed.

products.name: RISO Master FII Type 30E A4
products.description: A replacement master roll for RISO digital duplicators (risograph‑style printers). This FII Type A4 master functions as the eco‑friendly material stencil that the duplicator uses to burn an image for producing multiple identical prints with consistent sharpness. The system works with various RISO EZ, RZ, and SF series duplicators, which schools, offices, and print shops use in their operations.
products.fullDescription:
• Format: A4 (210 × 297 mm) fits A4 duplicators.
• Compatibility: Works with RISO EZ, RZ, and SF series duplicators (risograph machines).
• Material: Eco‑friendly master paper designed for clean, reliable master making and printing.
• Yield: Approximately 290 sheets per roll (A4 master frames), number of prints per roll before needing replacement.
• Installation: Quick and user‑friendly, simply roll the load into the duplicator’s master compartment.
• Packaging: Secure, eco‑conscious packaging for safe transport and storage.
• Best for: Replacing used master rolls in RISO digital duplicators to maintain consistent, high‑quality duplicated prints for documents, newsletters, manuals, and other high‑volume black‑and‑white or color jobs.

products.name: Epson TM-T20III Printer

• Fonts & Barcodes: Supports alphanumeric text, graphics, and many barcode types (UPC, EAN, Code 39/128, QR, PDF417, GS1 DataBar, etc.).

• Dimensions: 140 × 199 × 146 mm (W × D × H).
• Weight: 1.7 kg.
• Power: External AC adapter (24 V).

products.name: APC Back-UPS 700VA
products.description: The APC Back-UPS 700VA is a dependable and efficient uninterruptible power supply (UPS) designed to provide essential power backup and surge protection for home and small office setups.
products.fullDescription:
The APC Back-UPS 700VA is a dependable and efficient uninterruptible power supply (UPS) designed to provide essential power backup and surge protection for home and small office setups. Here's a detailed overview: The APC Back-UPS 700VA ensures uninterrupted operation of critical devices during power outages, surges, and voltage fluctuations. It is ideal for protecting electronics such as computers, routers, and modems. With its line-interactive topology, it stabilizes voltage levels and extends battery life. The APC Back-UPS 700VA features a compact tower design, making it easy to integrate into any workspace. This UPS includes audible alarms to notify users of power conditions and comes with user-replaceable batteries, ensuring long-term usability. It also supports automatic voltage regulation (AVR), which corrects minor power fluctuations without switching to battery power. Specifications
    Power Capacity: 700VA / 420W. Input Voltage: 120V. Output Voltage: 120V. Waveform Type: Stepped approximation to a sine wave. Transfer Time: 6 ms typical. Outlets: 6 outlets (3 with battery backup and surge protection, 3 with surge protection only). Battery Type: Sealed lead-acid, maintenance-free. Battery Recharge Time: 8�12 hours. Runtime: Varies based on load; suitable for short-term backup. Dimensions: Approximately 19 cm (H) x 11.5 cm (W) x 25 cm (D). Weight: Around 6.5 kg. Warranty: 2 years.

products.fullDescription:
The APPLE IPAD PRO 13-INCH 1TB SSD + CELLULAR is the pinnacle of tablet innovation, built for professionals, creatives, and power users who require top-tier performance and unparalleled functionality. Equipped with a brilliant 13-inch Ultra Retina XDR OLED display, the iPad Pro offers stunning visuals with HDR10, Dolby Vision, and a 120Hz refresh rate, making every image crisp and immersive. Powered by the advanced M4 chip, it delivers unmatched speed and efficiency, making multitasking, video editing, and 3D rendering seamless. The APPLE IPAD PRO 13-INCH 1TB SSD + CELLULAR excels in connectivity, featuring 5G cellular capability and Wi-Fi 6E for high-speed internet access wherever you go. The Thunderbolt/USB 4 port adds versatility, allowing fast data transfers and compatibility with external displays and accessories. It also includes dual high-quality cameras and a LiDAR Scanner, ensuring the best tools for photography, AR projects, and video calls. Compatible with premium accessories like the Apple Pencil Pro and Magic Keyboard, it transforms into a portable creative studio or workstation. Lightweight and beautifully designed, available in Space Black and Silver, the iPad Pro is built to meet the needs of professionals and enthusiasts alike.

products.name: Blackview Bluetooth 5.0
products.description: Blackview Bluetooth 5.0 devices are crafted to offer a cutting-edge experience in wireless connectivity.
products.fullDescription:
Blackview Bluetooth 5.0 devices are crafted to offer a cutting-edge experience in wireless connectivity. They employ Bluetooth 5.0 technology, which provides a more reliable and faster connection with enhanced range compared to previous versions. This ensures stable audio transmission for uninterrupted calls, music playback, and other wireless interactions. These devices are equipped with Environmental Noise Cancellation (ENC) or Digital Signal Processing (DSP) technologies, which significantly reduce background noise, ensuring clear and crisp audio in busy or noisy environments. Their low power consumption is another highlight, enabling extended usage on a single charge, perfect for active lifestyles and long commutes. The ergonomic and lightweight design of Blackview Bluetooth 5.0 devices prioritizes user comfort, making them ideal for both casual and professional use. Many models are water-resistant or sweatproof, ensuring durability during workouts or outdoor activities. Additionally, their compatibility with a wide range of Bluetooth-enabled devices, such as smartphones, tablets, and PCs, adds to their versatility. Designed with a focus on style and functionality, these devices also feature intuitive controls for easy pairing, volume adjustment, and call management. Whether you're looking for earbuds, headphones, or wearables, Blackview Bluetooth 5.0 devices provide an excellent balance of performance, durability, and comfort. Specifications
    Bluetooth Version: 5.0 Noise Cancellation: ENC/DSP for clear audio Battery Life: Varies by device; earbuds typically offer several hours of playback with additional charges via the case Design: Lightweight and ergonomic for comfort Compatibility: Supports smartphones, tablets, PCs, and other Bluetooth-enabled devices Range: Enhanced range compared to previous Bluetooth versions Power Efficiency: Optimized for low energy consumption

products.name: HIKVISION 4MP DUAL LIGHT COLOR BULLET NETWORK CAMERA
products.description: The Hikvision 4MP Dual Light Color Bullet Network Camera is a high-performance security camera designed for clear imaging in various lighting conditions.
products.fullDescription:
The Hikvision 4MP Dual Light Color Bullet Network Camera is a high-performance security camera designed for clear imaging in various lighting conditions. It features Smart Dual-Light technology, which combines infrared (IR) and white light illumination to enhance visibility in low-light environments. With 4MP resolution, 120dB wide dynamic range (WDR), and H.265+ compression, it ensures high-quality video output while optimizing storage efficiency. The HIKVISION 4MP DUAL LIGHT COLOR BULLET NETWORK CAMERA is IP67-rated, making it water and dust resistant, and supports human and vehicle classification based on deep learning for accurate motion detection. Camera Specifications
    Image Sensor: 1/3" Progressive Scan CMOS Resolution: 2688 � 1520 (4MP) Minimum Illumination: 0.001 Lux (Color, F1.0, AGC ON), 0 Lux with light Shutter Speed: 1/3 s to 1/100,000 s Day & Night Mode: IR cut filter Lens Options: Fixed focal lens (2.8mm or 4mm) Field of View:

Illumination & Smart Features

Durability & Connectivity

products.name: HIKVISION TANDEMVU 4INCH 2MP CAMERA
products.description: The Hikvision TandemVu 4inch 2MP camera is a versatile surveillance device designed for high-quality imaging and advanced monitoring.
products.fullDescription:
The Hikvision TandemVu 4inch 2MP camera is a versatile surveillance device designed for high-quality imaging and advanced monitoring. Here's an overview of its features:
    Resolution: Offers 2MP imaging for clear and detailed visuals. Dual Lens Design: Combines a bullet camera and a PTZ (Pan-Tilt-Zoom) camera for simultaneous panoramic and close-up views. Zoom Capability: Features 25� optical zoom and 16� digital zoom for capturing expansive areas and fine details. Low-Light Performance: Equipped with ColorVu and DarkFighter technologies for vivid, full-color images even in low-light conditions. Smart Functions: Includes perimeter protection, human and vehicle detection, and advanced AI features like automatic target tracking.
    Night Vision: Supports up to 100m IR distance and 30m white light for nighttime surveillance. Power Options: Compatible with 12V DC and PoE+ for flexible installation. Deep Learning: Focuses on human and vehicle classification to reduce false alarms.

products.name: SAMSUNG PENDRIVE 8GB
products.description: The 8GB USB Flash Drive is a compact and portable storage device designed for everyday use.
products.fullDescription:
The 8GB USB Flash Drive is a compact and portable storage device designed for everyday use. It provides sufficient storage capacity for essential files, including documents, photos, music, and videos, making it ideal for personal, educational, or professional purposes. Its lightweight and durable design ensures easy portability, allowing users to carry their data conveniently wherever they go. Equipped with USB 2.0 or USB 3.0 technology (depending on the model), the 8GB USB Flash Drive offers reliable data transfer speeds for quick and efficient file sharing. It is compatible with a wide range of devices, including laptops, desktops, and other USB-enabled devices, ensuring versatility and ease of use. Many models also feature a cap or retractable design to protect the USB connector from damage when not in use. The 8GB USB Flash Drive is a cost-effective solution for users who need a simple and dependable way to store and transfer data. Its plug-and-play functionality eliminates the need for additional software, making it user-friendly and accessible for all.
Specifications:
    Capacity: 8GB Interface: USB 2.0 or USB 3.0 (varies by model) Compatibility: Works with Windows, macOS, Linux, and other USB-enabled devices Design: Compact, lightweight, and durable Features: Plug-and-play functionality, protective cap or retractable design (varies by model)

products.name: Modio ME12 Bluetooth Earphone
products.description: The Modio ME12 Bluetooth Earphone is a versatile and stylish audio accessory designed for seamless wireless connectivity and exceptional sound quality.
products.fullDescription:
The Modio ME12 Bluetooth Earphone is a versatile and stylish audio accessory designed for seamless wireless connectivity and exceptional sound quality. Equipped with Bluetooth 5.0 technology, it ensures stable and efficient connections with a transmission range of up to 10 meters. This makes it compatible with a wide range of devices, including smartphones, tablets, and laptops, providing a hassle-free listening experience. The Modio ME12 Bluetooth Earphone features a compact and ergonomic design, ensuring a comfortable fit for extended use. Its lightweight build makes it ideal for on-the-go users, whether you're commuting, working out, or simply relaxing. The Modio ME12 is equipped with a high-definition microphone and intelligent noise reduction technology, delivering clear and crisp audio for calls and music. The stereo sound quality enhances your listening experience with deep bass and clear treble, making it perfect for music enthusiasts. One of the standout features of the Modio ME12 Bluetooth Earphone is its touch sensor control, which allows users to manage calls, music playback, and voice assistance with ease. The auto power on/off function adds to its convenience, ensuring the earphones are always ready for use. With a battery life of up to 3 hours on a single charge and an additional 9 hours provided by the charging case, the Modio ME12 offers reliable performance throughout the day. The charging case has a capacity of 360mAh, ensuring quick and efficient recharging. Designed for durability and practicality, the Modio ME12 Bluetooth Earphone is a perfect blend of style and functionality. Its sleek and modern design, combined with advanced features, makes it an excellent choice for users seeking a high-quality wireless earphone for everyday use.
Specifications
    Bluetooth Version: 5.0 Transmission Distance: Up to 10 meters Battery Life: 3 hours of continuous use, 9 hours with charging case Standby Time: 100 hours Charging Case Capacity: 360mAh Features: Touch sensor, auto power on/off, noise reduction, voice control Dimensions: 54.5 x 46.3 x 21.5 mm

products.name: Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-5AC-GEN2-EU
products.description: The Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-5AC-GEN2-EU is a powerful and cost-effective outdoor wireless broadband solution, designed for long-distance connectivity in the 5 GHz frequency range.
products.fullDescription:
The Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-5AC-GEN2-EU is a powerful and cost-effective outdoor wireless broadband solution, designed for long-distance connectivity in the 5 GHz frequency range. It features a high gain of 23 dBi, making it ideal for point-to-point and point-to-multi-point network setups. This device is part of Ubiquiti's airMAX ac series, delivering enhanced throughput of up to 450 Mbps and improved noise immunity. The Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-5AC-GEN2-EU incorporates an innovative lightweight, compact design with a high-gain directional antenna, ensuring reliable performance over distances of up to 30+ km. Its advanced mechanical design allows for quick assembly and precise alignment using a flexible ball joint mounting system. Built to withstand harsh outdoor environments, it is constructed with UV-resistant materials and operates within a temperature range of -40�C to 70�C. Combined with Ubiquiti�s airOS v8 software for better scalability and reduced latency, the Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-5AC-GEN2-EU�is a dependable choice for creating high-performance wireless bridges or serving as a robust client device in an airMAX network.

Specification

    Frequency Range: 5150 � 5875 MHz Gain: 23 dBi Throughput: Up to 450 Mbps Antenna Design: High-gain directional antenna Power Supply: 24V, 0.3A PoE adapter (included) Operating Temperature: -40�C to 70�C Mounting: Pole mounting kit included Wi-Fi Management: Dedicated Wi-Fi radio for easy setup and management Compliance: FCC, IC, CE certifications
This device is designed for long-distance connectivity and is part of Ubiquiti's airMAX ac series, ensuring reliable performance and scalability.

products.name: Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU
products.description: The Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU is an advanced and cost-effective solution designed for outdoor wireless broadband connectivity.
products.fullDescription:
The Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU is an advanced and cost-effective solution designed for outdoor wireless broadband connectivity. Operating in the 5 GHz frequency band, the Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU delivers exceptional performance with its 23 dBi gain, making it ideal for long-distance connections of up to 30+ km. Whether you're setting up a point-to-point link or creating a point-to-multi-point network, the Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU ensures reliable and efficient data transmission. This device incorporates InnerFeed technology, which combines the radio and antenna into a single, seamless unit for enhanced efficiency and reduced installation complexity. Its innovative design includes a lightweight, compact form factor and a flexible ball joint mounting system, simplifying alignment and setup. Built with durable, UV-resistant materials, the Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU is engineered to withstand harsh outdoor environments. Offering up to 100+ Mbps real-world throughput and leveraging Ubiquiti's airMAX technology for improved scalability and reduced latency, the Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU is the perfect choice for anyone seeking high-performance wireless bridging at an affordable price. . products.name: HUAWEI MIFI
products.description: Huawei MiFi devices, often called mobile Wi-Fi hotspots, are compact and portable wireless routers that use mobile data to create a Wi-Fi network for multiple devices.
products.fullDescription:
Huawei MiFi devices, often called mobile Wi-Fi hotspots, are compact and portable wireless routers that use mobile data to create a Wi-Fi network for multiple devices. They are ideal for travelers, remote workers, or anyone in need of reliable internet connectivity on the go. These devices support various network types (like 4G/3G), come with built-in rechargeable batteries, and have user-friendly features such as SIM card slots, Wi-Fi configuration options, and compatibility with apps like Huawei AI Life for easy management. Huawei MiFi models differ in design, performance, and extra functionalities, so specific s depend on the model you're interested in.

Specifications

    Network Connectivity: Supports LTE, UMTS, or 4G/3G networks. Wi-Fi Transmission: Single-band or dual-band with speeds ranging from 150 Mbps to 867 Mbps. Battery: Ranges from 1500 mAh to 3000 mAh for extended usage. Ports: Usually includes Micro USB or Type-C for charging, along with SIM card slots. Indicators: LED or LCD screens for network, battery, and signal status.

products.description: The Ubiquity NSM5 Nano Station M5 is a compact and versatile outdoor wireless bridge/base station designed for high-performance connectivity.
products.fullDescription:
The Ubiquity NSM5 Nano Station M5 is a compact and versatile outdoor wireless bridge/base station designed for high-performance connectivity. Operating on the 5 GHz frequency band, it delivers reliable point-to-point and point-to-multipoint wireless communication with a real outdoor throughput of over 150 Mbps and a range of up to 15+ km. The NSM5 features a 16 dBi dual-polarity antenna with optimized cross-polarity isolation, ensuring efficient and stable data transmission. It utilizes Ubiquiti's airMAX technology, which employs a Time Division Multiple Access (TDMA) protocol to enhance network performance by reducing latency and improving scalability. This device is equipped with two 10/100 Mbps Ethernet ports, one of which supports PoE passthrough, making it easy to integrate into existing network setups. Its durable design, made from outdoor UV-stabilized plastic, ensures reliable operation in harsh environments, withstanding temperatures from -30�C to 75�C and humidity levels of 5% to 95%. The Ubiquity NSM5 Nano Station M5 is ideal for applications such as extending network coverage, connecting remote locations, or providing internet access in challenging outdoor environments. Its sleek design, ease of installation, and robust performance make it a popular choice for both residential and commercial use.
    Processor: Atheros MIPS 24KC, 400 MHz. Memory: 32 MB SDRAM, 8 MB Flash. Power Supply: Passive PoE (24V, 0.5A adapter included). Power Consumption: Maximum of 8W. Operating Temperature: -30�C to 75�C (-22�F to 167�F). Humidity: 5% to 95% (non-condensing). Dimensions: 294 x 31 x 80 mm (11.6 x 1.3 x 3.2 inches). Weight: 400 g (14.1 oz). Durability: Built with outdoor UV-stabilized plastic and supports pole mounting.

products.name: Ubiquiti UniFi U6 Plus
products.description: The Ubiquiti UniFi U6 Plus is a sleek and high-performing WiFi 6 (802.11ax) access point that blends powerful features with an elegant design for modern wireless networks.
products.fullDescription:
The Ubiquiti UniFi U6 Plus is a sleek and high-performing WiFi 6 (802.11ax) access point that blends powerful features with an elegant design for modern wireless networks. It is engineered to deliver faster speeds, greater efficiency, and reliable connectivity for homes, offices, and small-to-medium-sized spaces. With dual-band operation, the U6 Plus offers up to 2.4 Gbps on the 5 GHz band and up to 573.5 Mbps on the 2.4 GHz band, providing an enhanced user experience with reduced latency and improved network capacity. Featuring 2x2 MU-MIMO and OFDMA technology, this access point efficiently handles multiple devices simultaneously, making it ideal for high-density environments. The U6 Plus has the capacity to support over 300 concurrent clients while maintaining consistent and dependable performance. Its compact design ensures easy installation, and it is suitable for ceiling or wall mounting. Built for durability, the U6 Plus operates under challenging conditions, with a temperature range of -30�C to 60�C and resistance to humidity levels of up to 95%. Its IPX5 rating provides protection against water exposure, making it reliable for both indoor and semi-outdoor setups. The Ubiquiti UniFi U6 Plus� includes advanced features such as band steering, wireless meshing, fast roaming, and guest network isolation, ensuring smooth and secure network management. Its customizable hotspot portal further enhances usability, allowing voucher-based authentication and tailored connectivity settings. Powered via PoE (802.3af), the UniFi U6 Plus integrates seamlessly into existing UniFi networks and offers one Gigabit Ethernet port for wired connectivity. Whether for personal use or business applications, theUbiquiti UniFi U6 Plus� is a robust and stylish solution for delivering high-speed, uninterrupted wireless connectivity.
    WiFi Standard: WiFi 6 (802.11ax) with 2x2 MU-MIMO and OFDMA. Frequency Bands:

products.name: CAT6 NETWORK CABLE
products.description: A Cat6 network cable is a standardized twisted-pair cable used for Ethernet and other network applications.
products.fullDescription:
A Cat6 network cable is a standardized twisted-pair cable used for Ethernet and other network applications. It offers higher performance than Cat 5e cables, supporting speeds of up to 10 Gbps at a frequency of 250 MHz.

Key Features of Cat 6 Cable
    Speed: Supports 10 Gbps over distances up to 55 meters; for longer distances, speeds may be lower.
  • Bandwidth: Operates at 250 MHz, reducing interference and improving data transmission.
  • Backward Compatibility: Works with Cat 5e and Cat 3 standards.
  • Shielding: Available in shielded (STP) and unshielded (UTP) versions to minimize crosstalk.
  • Connectors: Typically terminated with RJ45 connectors, using either T568A or T568B wiring standards.
  • Use Cases: Ideal for home networks, office setups, and data centers requiring reliable high-speed connections.
